# Pota Studio
> Italian full service marketing agency from Bergamo. Trusted by Samsung, Isybank and Cookies Digital.

## Pages
- [Home](https://potastudio.com): Agency overview, clients, services summary
- [Services](https://potastudio.com/services): Full list of services - paid ADS, social media, content production, influencer marketing, TikTok LIVE, Shopify
- [Work](https://potastudio.com/work): Case studies portfolio - Samsung, Isybank, Cookies Digital
- [About](https://potastudio.com/about): Team, story, culture
- [Clients](https://potastudio.com/clients): Our clients
- [Blog](https://potastudio.com/blog): Marketing insights, strategy, TikTok, digital marketing
- [Careers](https://potastudio.com/careers): Open positions
- [Contact](https://potastudio.com/contact): Start a project
- [Privacy](https://potastudio.com/privacy): Privacy policy
- [Cookie](https://potastudio.com/cookie): Cookie policy
